category.scope_note: Air-source heat pump compliance comparison for space heating and domestic hot water applications, China export to France.

title.en: China-to-France Air-source Heat Pump Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国空气源热泵进入法国：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國空氣源熱泵進入法國：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China air-source heat pump documentation against French market requirements: CE marking under LVD, EMC Directive, Ecodesign Regulation (EU) 2016/2281, F-gas Regulation (EU) 2024/573, Pressure Equipment Directive 2014/68/EU, French F-gas attestation de capacité, RE2020 building code, and ADEME MaPrimeRénov' subsidy criteria.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国空气源热泵文件与法国市场要求的差距对照，涵盖CE标志（低压指令、EMC指令）、生态设计法规（EU）2016/2281、氟化气体法规（EU）2024/573、压力设备指令2014/68/EU、法国氟化气体能力认证（attestation de capacité）、RE2020建筑法规及ADEME马普里莫诺夫补贴标准。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國空氣源熱泵文件與法國市場要求的差距對照，涵蓋CE標誌（低壓指令、EMC指令）、生態設計法規（EU）2016/2281、氟化氣體法規（EU）2024/573、壓力設備指令2014/68/EU、法國氟化氣體能力認證（attestation de capacité）、RE2020建築法規及ADEME馬普里莫諾夫補貼標準。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, notified-body assessment, refrigerant-handling guidance, pressure-system design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and installers should verify current EU and French law, harmonised standards, F-gas licensing requirements (including French attestation de capacité), pressure equipment categories, RE2020 building requirements, and subsidy eligibility with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、公告机构评审、制冷剂处理指导、压力系统设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行欧盟及法国法律、协调标准、氟化气体许可要求（包括法国能力认证attestation de capacité）、压力设备类别、RE2020建筑要求及补贴资格。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、公告機構評審、製冷劑處理指導、壓力系統設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行歐盟及法國法律、協調標準、氟化氣體許可要求（包括法國能力認證attestation de capacité）、壓力設備類別、RE2020建築要求及補貼資格。

answer_first.en: For France, the key compliance gaps for Chinese air-source heat pumps are: CE marking under LVD, EMC Directive, PED, and Ecodesign (EU) 2016/2281; French F-gas attestation de capacité for installers; RE2020 building code integration; and ADEME MaPrimeRénov' SCOP eligibility thresholds. France is an EU member state, so all EU CE marking obligations apply in full.
answer_first.zh: 对于法国市场，中国空气源热泵的主要合规差距为：依据低压指令、EMC指令、PED和生态设计法规（EU）2016/2281取得CE标志；安装方须持有法国氟化气体能力认证（attestation de capacité）；符合RE2020建筑规范；满足ADEME马普里莫诺夫补贴的SCOP资格门槛。法国为欧盟成员国，欧盟全部CE标志义务均完整适用。
answer_first.zht: 對於法國市場，中國空氣源熱泵的主要合規差距為：依據低壓指令、EMC指令、PED和生態設計法規（EU）2016/2281取得CE標誌；安裝方須持有法國氟化氣體能力認證（attestation de capacité）；符合RE2020建築規範；滿足ADEME馬普里莫諾夫補貼的SCOP資格門檻。法國為歐盟成員國，歐盟全部CE標誌義務均完整適用。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, notified body, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
